headline: Odysseas Vlachodimos
body: Odysseas Vlachodimos will remain at Sevilla for the 2026/27 campaign after signing another season-long loan with the La Liga side. Wishing you the best of luck, vlachOD1mos 🧤 Link 🔗 newcastleunited.com
raw_text:
Odysseas Vlachodimos will remain at Sevilla for the 2026/27 campaign after signing another season-long loan with the La Liga side.

Wishing you the best of luck, @vlachOD1mos 🧤

Link



🔗
